_publications._publicationTitle: Global Proteome and Phospho-proteome Analysis of Merlin-deficient Meningioma and Schwannoma Identifies PDLIM2 as a Novel Therapeutic Target.

_contextSnippet: PDLIM2 was not expressed in HMC or normal meningeal tissue and minimally expressed in the Schwann cell examined
details: PDLIM2 was not expressed in HMC, serving as normal control for comparison with tumor cells
